senses.gloss: to precede, to pass, to outgo, to slip, to shed, to strip

examples.text: قَالَا رَبَّنَا إِنَّنَا نَخَافُ أَن يَفْرُطَ عَلَيْنَا أَوْ أَن يَطْغَىٰ
examples.english: They said: Our Lord, indeed we fear that they hasten against us or transgress!

senses.gloss: to send before; to hand over, to make go before
to forgo, to abandon, to let slide, to slight, to relinquish, to let go away, to dump

examples.text: ينبغي أن نكون صارميم والا انتهينا, إن قوتنا تكمن في مواقفنا الشجاعة التي لايمكن أن نفرط بها.
examples.english: The vital thing is that we stay rugged and have not quitted. For our power hides in our dauntless positions which to relinquish is unworkable for us.

senses.gloss: to dissipate, to squander, to splurge
erect waymark, sign set up to show the right way
one who goes forth, or precedes, preceder, foregoer
a case or affair in which the due limits are exceeded

examples.text: وَلَا تُطِعْ مَنْ أَغْفَلْنَا قَلْبَهُ عَن ذِكْرِنَا وَاتَّبَعَ هَوَاهُ وَكَانَ أَمْرُهُ فُرُطًا
examples.english: And do not obey whose heart we have made heedless of our remembrance and who follows his lust and whose affair is in excess of limits!

senses.gloss: a hill or eminence resembling a mountain
